name: Fudgy Bat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a serrated knife to carefully cut 18 of the cookies into quarters.
2. Save remaining cookies for another use.
3. For each bat, place 2 cookie quarters about 1/4 inch apart on waxed paper. Repeat with remaining quarters.
4. Melt candy melts. Drop about 1/2 teaspoon of melted candy at the center of each bat, connecting the cookies.
5. Use a toothpick to smooth the melted candy into a uniform circle.
6. Cool completely before removing from waxed paper.
